# remnawave_billing_node (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave infra billing node.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `next_billing_at` (String) Next billing date (ISO 8601 datetime).
- `provider_uuid` (String) UUID of the infra provider.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Optional display name.
- `node_uuid` (String) UUID of the associated node (optional).

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String)
